original_requirement: User must be able to pause meal subscription.

refined_requirement.description: Users can pause their meal subscription for a fixed period, which affects meal delivery, subscription billing, and billing, and they will receive an in-app notification and a refund for meals.

business_rules.text: The user can pause their meal subscription for a fixed period.
When a user pauses their subscription, meals are refunded.
Pausing a subscription affects subscription billing.
The user will receive an in-app notification when they pause their subscription.
The pause subscription feature is part of the subscription domain.
Pausing a subscription impacts meal delivery, subscription billing, subscription, and billing.

user_stories.story: As a User, I want to pause my meal subscription for a fixed period so that I can temporarily stop meal deliveries and receive a refund for meals.

acceptance_criteria.text: The user can pause their meal subscription for a fixed period.
Meals are refunded when a user pauses their subscription.
Pausing a subscription affects subscription billing.
The user receives an in-app notification when they pause their subscription.

clarification.stage2_followup_resolution: Use the strictest interpretation so answers do not contradict
